Double stop order is an opportunity to take into account a potential rise and fall of the price in a single order

Limit order is a way to buy or sell a certain cryptocurrency at the desired price. Funds required for the execution of this order (total cost of the transaction) will be reserved in your account. They will be debited from your account as soon as the market price reaches the one you set and the order is executed
It is the easiest way to place an order. It is convenient when you need to quickly sell or buy a coin/token at the market price
Stop order is needed in cases when you are waiting for the best price to buy or sell an asset- but want to play it safe in case if the price goes in the opposite direction

Trailing order is a smart order that can help you to get profit. After placing an order- when the price reaches the activation level and continues to move in the desired direction- the activation level will move behind it along with the stop level and limit price. When the price changes direction and reaches the stop level- a limit order will be placed.
